tasks.name: Project Charter Development
tasks.description: Drafting the project charter defining objectives, scope, stakeholders, constraints, and success criteria.

tasks.name: Stakeholder Analysis
tasks.description: Identifying stakeholders, assessing their influence and interest, and developing a stakeholder engagement plan.

tasks.name: Resource Planning
tasks.description: Estimating team composition, skillsets, and resource availability needed for project execution.

tasks.name: Budget Estimation
tasks.description: Developing initial cost estimates covering personnel, infrastructure, licensing, and contingency reserves.

tasks.name: Risk Register Initialization
tasks.description: Identifying early project risks, assessing probability and impact, and defining initial mitigation strategies.

tasks.name: Project Plan & WBS
tasks.description: Creating the detailed project plan with Work Breakdown Structure, milestones, and critical path analysis.

tasks.name: Schedule Development
tasks.description: Building project timelines using Gantt charts, defining dependencies, and setting baseline schedules.

tasks.name: RACI Matrix Definition
tasks.description: Establishing clear roles and responsibilities across all workstreams using RACI (Responsible, Accountable, Consulted, Informed).

tasks.name: Communication Plan
tasks.description: Defining reporting cadence, meeting schedules, escalation paths, and communication channels for all stakeholders.

tasks.name: Vendor & Procurement Management
tasks.description: Coordinating vendor selection, contract negotiation, SOWs, and third-party onboarding when applicable.

tasks.name: Progress Tracking & Reporting
tasks.description: Monitoring project health through status reports, dashboards, earned value metrics, and milestone tracking.

tasks.name: Risk & Issue Management
tasks.description: Continuously updating the risk register, managing issue logs, and driving resolution of escalated blockers.

tasks.name: Scope Management
tasks.description: Controlling scope through formal change request processes, impact assessments, and change control board decisions.

tasks.name: Resource Management
tasks.description: Balancing team workloads, resolving resource conflicts, and adjusting allocations based on project needs.

tasks.name: Stakeholder Communication
tasks.description: Conducting regular status meetings, steering committee updates, and executive briefings to maintain alignment.

tasks.name: UAT Coordination
tasks.description: Planning UAT timelines, coordinating business user participation, and ensuring environment readiness.

tasks.name: Go/No-Go Decision Facilitation
tasks.description: Organizing go/no-go review meetings with key stakeholders based on quality metrics and risk assessment.

tasks.name: Release Planning
tasks.description: Coordinating release schedules, deployment windows, and rollback contingencies with all involved teams.

tasks.name: Compliance & Audit Readiness
tasks.description: Ensuring all project documentation, approvals, and sign-offs are complete for governance and audit requirements.

tasks.name: Go-Live Coordination
tasks.description: Orchestrating the production launch across development, operations, support, and business teams.

tasks.name: Hypercare Management
tasks.description: Managing the post-launch support period with dedicated resources, escalation procedures, and rapid response.

tasks.name: Project Closure
tasks.description: Conducting formal project closure including final sign-offs, budget reconciliation, and contract closeouts.

tasks.name: Lessons Learned & Retrospective
tasks.description: Facilitating post-project retrospectives to capture successes, challenges, and improvement recommendations.

tasks.name: Benefits Handover
tasks.description: Transitioning project deliverables to operations and business owners with documented support and maintenance plans.
